ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was last updated */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of the experiment (e.g., hyperparameter tuning, neural architecture search) */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Machine learning framework used (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment ended */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* JSON object to store key performance metrics of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the trial belongs to */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used in the trial */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the trial was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the trial was last updated */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the trial */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used in the trial */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the trial */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the trial (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* JSON object to store key performance metrics of the trial */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of computing resource used (e.g., local, cluster, cloud) */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* ID of the computing resource used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_jobs" (
  "trial_job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial job */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the job belongs to */,
  "job_name" TEXT /* Name of the job */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the job (e.g., waiting, running, succeeded, failed) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the job was started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the job was finished */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of computing resource used (e.g., local, cluster, cloud) */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* ID of the computing resource used */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* JSON object to store key performance metrics of the job */,
  "log_path" TEXT /* Path to the log file associated with the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_jobs_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "trial_job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial job the event is related to */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., waiting, running, succeeded, failed) */,
  "event_data" TEXT /* Data associated with the event */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the event occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the event */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of computing resource involved in the event */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* ID of the computing resource involved in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_trial_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_job_id") REFERENCES trial_jobs ("trial_job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "trial_job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial job the log is related to */,
  "log_path" TEXT /* Path to the log file */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the log */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of computing resource involved in the log */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* ID of the computing resource involved in the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_trial_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_job_id") REFERENCES trial_jobs ("trial_job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user works in */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
